settings.brand_featured_text:
Liss Unlimited for Anti-Frizz and Nourishment
Rebellious, frizzy and dry hair have finally met their match! Enriched with Pro-Keratin, Kukui, and Primrose oil, the #LissUnlimited range provides up to 4 days of anti-frizz effect, even with 80% level of humidity.

settings.section-sub-heading: Enriched with Pro-Keratine and Kukui & Evening Primrose Oil, the Liss Unlimited range purifies the hair & scalp providing up to 4 days of anti-frizz effect, even with a 80% level of humidity

settings.description_1:
L'Oréal Serie Expert Liss Unlimited Shampoo
A gentle daily cleanser that replenishes and smoothes rebellious hair for a manageable frizz-free result
settings.description_2:
L'Oréal Serie Expert Liss Unlimited Masque
A luscious smoothing mask treatment that deeply conditions the hair and protects the fibers against humidity, for enhanced control and shine
settings.description_3:
L'Oréal Serie Expert Liss Unlimited Blow Drying Oil
A light, water-soluble formula serum that seals the hair giving it a fabulous shine and controlled smoothness
